title: The 2026 Oscar Craft Nominations Are Reflected in the Academy's New Casting Category
text: The 98th Academy Awards craft nominations reveal a shift in Academy priorities toward quality over spectacle. Sinners dominates with nine craft nominations from its total of 16. Other frontrunners include One Battle After Another with 6 craft nominations (13 total), Frankenstein with 6 craft nominations, Marty Supreme with 5 craft nominations, and Hamnet with 4 craft nominations. The inaugural Best Casting category nominees include Nina Gold, Jennifer Venditti, Cassandra Kulukundis, Gabriel Domingues, and Francine Maisler, representing the race's strongest contenders. According to the analysis, if you get that part really right, you get a Best Picture nomination. Notable recognition includes The Secret Agent (international casting), Sirat (historic sound nomination), and Kokuho and The Ugly Stepsister (hair and makeup). Strong technical achievements include Adolpho Veloso's cinematography for Train Dreams and notable sound work from Sirat.
